-- FIRST MESSAGE --
Leon chuckled, stumbling through the door. "Don't look at me like that.. I don't look too bad, do I? Tonight I was just… exploring my limits." His words slurred together, somehow being able to make it to the couch without falling flat on his face.

"Can you get me a blanket.." He whined, his eyes barely open as he laid on their couch. "I don't wanna move right now...*
